primaryCategories.label: Agentic AI
primaryCategories.description: Autonomous agents that plan, reason, use tools, and take multi-step actions toward a goal
primaryCategories.examples: Multi-agent orchestrators, tool-calling agents, autonomous research agents, self-healing systems

primaryCategories.label: Generative AI
primaryCategories.description: Creating new content — text, images, video, audio, code, 3D
primaryCategories.examples: LLM content gen, image generation, video synthesis, code assistants, voice cloning

primaryCategories.label: Predictive AI
primaryCategories.description: Forecasting future outcomes from historical/pattern data
primaryCategories.examples: Churn prediction, demand forecasting, lead scoring, risk assessment, time-series forecasting

primaryCategories.label: Computer Vision
primaryCategories.description: Understanding and processing visual data — images, video, diagrams
primaryCategories.examples: Object detection, OCR, image classification, facial recognition, video analysis, document scanning

primaryCategories.label: NLP / Language Understanding
primaryCategories.description: Extracting meaning, intent, and structure from text
primaryCategories.examples: Sentiment analysis, entity extraction, text classification, summarisation, translation, semantic search

primaryCategories.label: Recommendation & Personalisation
primaryCategories.description: Ranking, surfacing, or personalising content/products for a user
primaryCategories.examples: Product recommendations, content ranking, personalised feeds, collaborative filtering

primaryCategories.label: Anomaly & Fraud Detection
primaryCategories.description: Identifying unusual patterns, outliers, or suspicious behaviour
primaryCategories.examples: Fraud detection, system monitoring, intrusion detection, quality control, outlier analysis

primaryCategories.label: Speech & Audio AI
primaryCategories.examples: Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, speaker diarisation, audio classification, real-time transcription

primaryCategories.label: Custom / Fine-Tuned Models
primaryCategories.description: Models trained or fine-tuned from scratch on domain-specific data, not off-the-shelf
primaryCategories.examples: Custom LLMs, domain-specific classifiers, specialised embedding models, fine-tuned diffusion models

primaryCategories.label: Data Engineering & ML Ops
primaryCategories.description: The infrastructure and pipelines that make AI systems work in production
primaryCategories.examples: Feature stores, data pipelines, model registries, A/B testing, monitoring, drift detection

primaryCategories.label: Embedded / Edge AI
primaryCategories.description: AI running on-device or at the edge, not in the cloud
primaryCategories.examples: On-device inference, IoT AI, mobile ML, real-time edge processing

primaryCategories.label: Knowledge & Reasoning
primaryCategories.description: Structured knowledge representation, logic, graph-based reasoning
primaryCategories.examples: Knowledge graphs, ontology systems, rule engines, causal reasoning, graph RAG

architecturePatterns.label: Multi-Agent System
architecturePatterns.description: Multiple specialised agents collaborating under an orchestrator

architecturePatterns.label: RAG Pipeline
architecturePatterns.description: Retrieval-augmented generation — vector/keyword search feeds context into an LLM

architecturePatterns.label: Single Agent + Tools
architecturePatterns.description: One LLM-based agent with access to external tools/APIs

architecturePatterns.label: Model Pipeline
architecturePatterns.description: Sequential chain of models — preprocessing → model → postprocessing

architecturePatterns.label: Fine-Tuned Model
architecturePatterns.description: Custom-trained model with inference serving wrapper

architecturePatterns.label: API Orchestration
architecturePatterns.description: Multiple external AI APIs stitched together — no custom model

architecturePatterns.label: Batch Processing
architecturePatterns.description: Scheduled offline model runs on bulk data

architecturePatterns.label: Hybrid / Complex
architecturePatterns.description: Doesn't fit a single pattern — combination of multiple approaches

autonomyLevels.label: Fully Autonomous
autonomyLevels.description: Runs end-to-end with no human in the loop — makes its own decisions and acts

autonomyLevels.label: Human-in-the-Loop
autonomyLevels.description: AI proposes, human reviews and approves before action is taken

autonomyLevels.label: Human-Approval-Required
autonomyLevels.description: AI does all the work, but a human must explicitly approve the output before it's published/sent

autonomyLevels.label: Advisory Only
autonomyLevels.description: AI provides recommendations/suggestions, human does all the actual work

suggestedMethodologies.description: AI generates → second AI validates → retry if invalid
Providing examples in the prompt to guide output
Training models on human preference data
Exploring multiple reasoning paths before committing
Forcing LLM output into a defined schema
Combining text + image + audio in a single pipeline
Combining structured graph reasoning with generative AI
Two-stage retrieval — semantic search then precision reranking
Multiple sequential prompts where output of one feeds the next
System detects its own errors and retries with fixes
Real-time server-sent events for live AI output
Running models locally without cloud dependency
